items.title: Fast American Option Pricing using Nonlinear Stencils.
items.abstract: We study the binomial, trinomial, and Black-Scholes-Merton models of option pricing. We present fast parallel discrete-time finite-difference algorithms for American call option pricing under the binomial and trinomial models and American put option pricing under the Black-Scholes-Merton model. For T-step finite differences, each algorithm runs in O (T log2 T)/p + T) time under a greedy scheduler on p processing cores, which is a significant improvement over the Θ (T2/p) + Ω (T log T) time taken by the corresponding state-of-the-art parallel algorithm. Even when run on a single core, the O (T log2 T) time taken by our algorithms is asymptotically much smaller than the Θ (T2) running time of the fastest known serial algorithms. Implementations of our algorithms significantly outperform the fastest implementations of existing algorithms in practice, e.g., when run for T ≈ 1000 steps on a 48-core machine, our algorithm for the binomial model runs at least 15× faster than the fastest existing parallel program for the same model with the speedup factor gradually reaching beyond 500× for T ≈ 0.5 × 106. It saves more than 80% energy when T ≈ 4000, and more than 99% energy for T > 60,000.
items.abstract_zh: 我们研究期权定价的二项式、三项式和 Black-Scholes-Merton 模型。我们提出了二项式和三项式模型下的美式看涨期权定价以及 Black-Scholes-Merton 模型下的美式看跌期权定价的快速并行离散时间有限差分算法。对于 T 步有限差分，每个算法在 p 个处理核心上的贪婪调度程序下以 O (T log2 T)/p + T) 时间运行，这比相应最先进的并行算法所需的 θ (T2/p) + Ω (T log T) 时间有显着改进。即使在单核上运行，我们的算法所花费的 O (T log2 T) 时间也渐近地远小于已知最快串行算法的 θ (T2) 运行时间。我们的算法的实现明显优于实践中现有算法的最快实现，例如，当在 48 核机器上运行 T ≈ 1000 步时，我们的二项式模型算法比同一模型的现有最快并行程序至少快 15 倍，并且当 T ≈ 0.5 × 106 时，加速因子逐渐达到 500 倍以上。当 T ≈ 0.5 × 106 时，它节省了 80% 以上的能量。 4000，T > 60,000 时能量超过 99%。

items.title: Memory Bounds for Concurrent Bounded Queues.
items.abstract: Concurrent data structures often require additional memory for handling synchronization issues in addition to memory for storing elements. Depending on the amount of this additional memory, implementations can be more or less memory-friendly. A memory-optimal implementation enjoys the minimal possible memory overhead, which, in practice, reduces cache misses and unnecessary memory reclamation.
items.abstract_zh: 除了用于存储元素的内存之外，并发数据结构通常还需要额外的内存来处理同步问题。根据额外内存的数量，实现可能或多或少是内存友好的。内存优化实现享有尽可能小的内存开销，这在实践中减少了缓存未命中和不必要的内存回收。

items.title: Recurrence Analysis for Automatic Parallelization of Subscripted Subscripts.
items.abstract: Introducing correct and optimal OpenMP parallelization directives in applications is a challenge. To parallelize a loop in an input application code automatically, parallelizing compilers need to disprove dependences with respect to variables across iterations of the loop. Performing such dependence analysis in the presence of index arrays or subscripted subscripts - a[b[i]] - has long been a challenge for automatic parallelizers. Loops with subscripted subscripts can be parallelized if the subscript array is known to possess a property such as monotonicity. This paper presents a compiletime algorithm that can analyze complex recurrence relations and determine irregular or intermittent monotonicity of one-dimensional and monotonicity of multi-dimensional subscript arrays. The new algorithm builds on a prior approach that is capable of analyzing simple recurrence relations and determining monotonic one-dimensional subscript arrays. Experimental results show that automatic parallelizers equipped with our new analysis techniques can substantially improve the performance of ten out of twelve or 83.33% of the benchmarks evaluated, 25--33.33% more than possible with state-of-the-art compile-time automatic parallelization techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 在应用程序中引入正确且最佳的 OpenMP 并行化指令是一项挑战。为了自动并行化输入应用程序代码中的循环，并行化编译器需要反驳循环迭代中变量的依赖性。在存在索引数组或下标下标 - a[b[i]] 的情况下执行此类依赖性分析长期以来一直是自动并行器的挑战。如果已知下标数组具有单调性等属性，则具有下标下标的循环可以并行化。本文提出了一种编译时算法，可以分析复杂的递推关系并确定一维的不规则或间歇单调性以及多维下标数组的单调性。新算法建立在现有方法的基础上，该方法能够分析简单的递归关系并确定单调一维下标数组。实验结果表明，配备我们新分析技术的自动并行器可以显着提高 12 项中的 10 项或所评估基准的 83.33% 的性能，比使用最先进的编译时自动并行化技术的性能提高 25--33.33%。

items.title: VERLIB: Concurrent Versioned Pointers.
items.abstract: Recent work has shown how to augment any CAS-based concurrent data structure to support taking a snapshot of the current memory state. Taking the snapshot, as well as loads and CAS (Compare and Swap) operations, take constant time. Importantly, such snapshotting can be used to easily implement linearizable queries, such as range queries, over any part of a data structure.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的工作展示了如何增强任何基于 CAS 的并发数据结构以支持获取当前内存状态的快照。拍摄快照以及加载和 CAS（比较和交换）操作需要恒定的时间。重要的是，这种快照可用于轻松地在数据结构的任何部分实现线性化查询，例如范围查询。

items.title: ConvStencil: Transform Stencil Computation to Matrix Multiplication on Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Tensor Core Unit (TCU) is increasingly integrated into modern high-performance processors to enhance matrix multiplication performance. However, constrained to its over-specification, its potential for improving other critical scientific operations like stencil computations remains untapped.
items.abstract_zh: 张量核心单元（TCU）越来越多地集成到现代高性能处理器中，以增强矩阵乘法性能。然而，由于其过度规范，其改进其他关键科学操作（例如模板计算）的潜力仍未得到开发。

items.title: FastFold: Optimizing AlphaFold Training and Inference on GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: Protein structure prediction helps to understand gene translation and protein function, which is of growing interest and importance in structural biology. The AlphaFold model, which used transformer architecture to achieve atomic-level accuracy in protein structure prediction, was a significant breakthrough. However, training and inference of AlphaFold model are challenging due to its high computation and memory cost. In this work, we present FastFold, an efficient implementation of AlphaFold for both training and inference. We propose Dynamic Axial Parallelism (DAP) as a novel model parallelism method. Additionally, we have implemented a series of low-level optimizations aimed at reducing communication, computation, and memory costs. These optimizations include Duality Async Operations, highly optimized kernels, and AutoChunk (an automated search algorithm finds the best chunk strategy to reduce memory peaks). Experimental results show that FastFold can efficiently scale to more GPUs using DAP and reduces overall training time from 11 days to 67 hours and achieves 7.5 ~ 9.5× speedup for long-sequence inference. Furthermore, AutoChunk can reduce memory cost by over 80% during inference by automatically partitioning the intermediate tensors during the computation.
items.abstract_zh: 蛋白质结构预测有助于理解基因翻译和蛋白质功能，这在结构生物学中日益引起人们的兴趣和重要性。 AlphaFold 模型使用 Transformer 架构实现了蛋白质结构预测的原子级精度，是一项重大突破。然而，由于计算量和内存成本较高，AlphaFold 模型的训练和推理具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FastFold，这是一种用于训练和推理的 AlphaFold 的高效实现。我们提出动态轴向并行（DAP）作为一种新颖的模型并行方法。此外，我们还实施了一系列低级优化，旨在减少通信、计算和内存成本。这些优化包括对偶异步操作、高度优化的内核和 AutoChunk（自动搜索算法找到减少内存峰值的最佳块策略）。实验结果表明，FastFold 可以使用 DAP 有效地扩展到更多 GPU，并将整体训练时间从 11 天减少到 67 小时，并实现长序列推理 7.5 ~ 9.5 倍的加速。此外，AutoChunk 通过在计算过程中自动划分中间张量，可以将推理过程中的内存成本降低 80% 以上。

items.title: Shared Memory-contention-aware Concurrent DNN Execution for Diversely Heterogeneous System-on-Chips.
items.abstract: Two distinguishing features of state-of-the-art mobile and autonomous systems are: 1) There are often multiple workloads, mainly deep neural network (DNN) inference, running concurrently and continuously. 2) They operate on shared memory System-on-Chips (SoC) that embed heterogeneous accelerators tailored for specific operations. State-of-the-art systems lack efficient performance and resource management techniques necessary to either maximize total system throughput or minimize end-to-end workload latency. In this work, we propose HaX-CoNN, a novel scheme that characterizes and maps layers in concurrently executing DNN inference workloads to a diverse set of accelerators within an SoC. Our scheme uniquely takes per-layer execution characteristics, shared memory (SM) contention, and inter-accelerator transitions into account to find optimal schedules. We evaluate HaX-CoNN on NVIDIA Orin, NVIDIA Xavier, and Qualcomm Snapdragon 865 SoCs. Our experimental results indicate that HaX-CoNN can minimize memory contention by up to 45% and improve total latency and throughput by up to 32% and 29%, respectively, compared to the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的移动和自治系统的两个显着特征是：1）通常有多个工作负载，主要是并发且连续运行的深度神经网络（DNN）推理。 2) 它们在共享内存片上系统 (SoC) 上运行，该片上系统嵌入了针对特定操作定制的异构加速器。最先进的系统缺乏最大化总系统吞吐量或最小化端到端工作负载延迟所需的高效性能和资源管理技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HaX-CoNN，这是一种新颖的方案，它描述并发执行 DNN 推理工作负载中的层并将其映射到 SoC 内的一组不同的加速器。我们的方案独特地考虑了每层执行特性、共享内存 (SM) 争用和加速器间转换，以找到最佳调度。我们在 NVIDIA Orin、NVIDIA Xavier 和 Qualcomm Snapdragon 865 SoC 上评估 HaX-CoNN。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，HaX-CoNN 可以将内存争用减少高达 45%，并将总延迟和吞吐量分别提高高达 32% 和 29%。

items.title: Parallel Integer Sort: Theory and Practice.
items.abstract: Integer sorting is a fundamental problem in computer science. This paper studies parallel integer sort both in theory and in practice. In theory, we show tighter bounds for a class of existing practical integer sort algorithms, which provides a solid theoretical foundation for their widespread usage in practice and strong performance. In practice, we design a new integer sorting algorithm, DovetailSort, that is theoretically-efficient and has good practical performance.
items.abstract_zh: 整数排序是计算机科学中的一个基本问题。本文从理论上和实践上研究了并行整数排序。理论上，我们为一类现有的实用整数排序算法展示了更严格的界限，这为其在实践中的广泛使用和强大的性能提供了坚实的理论基础。在实践中，我们设计了一种新的整数排序算法DovetailSort，该算法理论上高效且具有良好的实际性能。

items.title: Liger: Interleaving Intra- and Inter-Operator Parallelism for Distributed Large Model Inference.
items.abstract: Distributed large model inference is still in a dilemma where balancing cost and effect. The online scenarios demand intraoperator parallelism to achieve low latency and intensive communications makes it costly. Conversely, the inter-operator parallelism can achieve high throughput with much fewer communications, but it fails to enhance the effectiveness.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式大模型推理仍然处于成本与效果平衡的困境。在线场景需要操作员内并行性来实现低延迟，而密集的通信使其成本高昂。相反，操作间并行可以通过更少的通信实现高吞吐量，但无法提高有效性。

items.title: POSTER: Optimizing Sparse Tensor Contraction with Revisiting Hash Table Design.
items.abstract: Sparse tensor contraction (SpTC) serves as an essential operation in high-performance applications. The high dimensionality of sparse tensors makes SpTC fundamentally challenging in aspects such as costly multidimensional index search, extensive intermediate output data, and indirect addressing. Previous state-of-the-art work addresses some of these challenges through hash-table implementation. In this paper, we propose a hash-table based and fully optimized SpTC by providing a more carefully designed customized hash table design, proposing an architecture-aware algorithm for hash table selection with size prediction, applying cross-stage optimizations to exploit shared information and avoid redundant operations. Evaluating on a set of tensors extracted from the real world, our method can achieve superior speedup and reduce the memory footprint substantially compared to the current state-of-the-art work.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量收缩（SpTC）是高性能应用程序中的一项重要操作。稀疏张量的高维性使得 SpTC 在昂贵的多维索引搜索、广泛的中间输出数据和间接寻址等方面面临着根本性的挑战。以前最先进的工作通过哈希表实现解决了其中一些挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于哈希表且完全优化的 SpTC，通过提供更仔细设计的定制哈希表设计，提出一种用于哈希表选择和大小预测的架构感知算法，应用跨阶段优化来利用共享信息并避免冗余操作。通过评估从现实世界中提取的一组张量，与当前最先进的工作相比，我们的方法可以实现卓越的加速并大大减少内存占用。

items.title: POSTER: Enabling Extreme-Scale Phase Field Simulation with In-situ Feature Extraction.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present an integrated framework composed of a highly efficient phase field simulator and an in-situ feature extraction library. This novel framework enables us to conduct extreme-scale micro-structure evolution simulations while the characteristic features of each individual grain are extracted on the fly. After systematic design and optimization on the new generation Sunway supercomputer, the code scales up to 39 million cores and achieves 582 PFlops in double precision and 637 POps in mixed precision.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个由高效相场模拟器和原位特征提取库组成的集成框架。这种新颖的框架使我们能够进行超大规模的微观结构演化模拟，同时动态提取每个颗粒的特征。经过在新一代神威超级计算机上的系统设计和优化，代码扩展至3900万核，双精度达到582 PFlops，混合精度达到637 POps。

items.title: GraphCube: Interconnection Hierarchy-aware Graph Processing.
items.abstract: Processing large-scale graphs with billions to trillions of edges requires efficiently utilizing parallel systems. However, current graph processing engines do not scale well beyond a few tens of computing nodes because they are oblivious to the communication cost variations across the interconnection hierarchy. We introduce GraphCube, a better approach to optimizing graph processing on large-scale parallel systems with complex interconnections. GraphCube features a new graph partitioning approach to achieve better load balancing and minimize communication overhead across multiple levels of the interconnection hierarchy. We evaluate GraphCube by applying it to fundamental graph operations performed on synthetic and real-world graph datasets. Our evaluation used up to 79,024 computing nodes and 1.2+ million processor cores. Our large-scale experiments show that GraphCube outperforms state-of-the-art parallel graph processing methods in throughput and scalability. Furthermore, GraphCube outperformed the top-ranked systems on the Graph 500 list.
items.abstract_zh: 处理具有数十亿到数万亿条边的大规模图需要有效地利用并行系统。然而，当前的图形处理引擎无法扩展到超出数十个计算节点，因为它们忽略了互连层次结构中的通信成本变化。我们介绍 GraphCube，这是一种在具有复杂互连的大规模并行系统上优化图形处理的更好方法。 GraphCube 采用新的图形分区方法，可以实现更好的负载平衡，并最大限度地减少互连层次结构多个级别之间的通信开销。我们通过将 GraphCube 应用于在合成和真实世界图数据集上执行的基本图操作来对其进行评估。我们的评估使用了多达 79,024 个计算节点和 1.2+ 万个处理器核心。我们的大规模实验表明，GraphCube 在吞吐量和可扩展性方面优于最先进的并行图处理方法。此外，GraphCube 的性能优于 Graph 500 列表中排名靠前的系统。

items.title: Arrow Matrix Decomposition: A Novel Approach for Communication-Efficient Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract: We propose a novel approach to iterated sparse matrix dense matrix multiplication, a fundamental computational kernel in scientific computing and graph neural network training. In cases where matrix sizes exceed the memory of a single compute node, data transfer becomes a bottleneck. An approach based on dense matrix multiplication algorithms leads to sub-optimal scalability and fails to exploit the sparsity in the problem. To address these challenges, we propose decomposing the sparse matrix into a small number of highly structured matrices called arrow matrices, which are connected by permutations. Our approach enables communication-avoiding multiplications, achieving a polynomial reduction in communication volume per iteration for matrices corresponding to planar graphs and other minor-excluded families of graphs. Our evaluation demonstrates that our approach outperforms a state-of-the-art method for sparse matrix multiplication on matrices with hundreds of millions of rows, offering near-linear strong and weak scaling.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种迭代稀疏矩阵稠密矩阵乘法的新方法，这是科学计算和图神经网络训练中的基本计算内核。如果矩阵大小超过单个计算节点的内存，数据传输就会成为瓶颈。基于密集矩阵乘法算法的方法会导致可扩展性次优，并且无法利用问题中的稀疏性。为了解决这些挑战，我们建议将稀疏矩阵分解为少量称为箭头矩阵的高度结构化矩阵，它们通过排列连接。我们的方法能够实现避免通信的乘法，对于与平面图和其他次要排除图族相对应的矩阵，实现每次迭代通信量的多项式减少。我们的评估表明，我们的方法优于对数亿行矩阵进行稀疏矩阵乘法的最先进方法，提供近线性的强和弱缩放。

items.title: POSTER: Pattern-Aware Sparse Communication for Scalable Recommendation Model Training.
items.abstract: Recommendation models are an important category of deep learning models whose size is growing enormous. They consist of a sparse part with TBs of memory footprint and a dense part that demands PFLOPs of computing capability to train. Unfortunately, the high sparse communication cost to re-organize data for different parallel strategies of the two parts impedes the scalability in training.
items.abstract_zh: 推荐模型是深度学习模型的一个重要类别，其规模正在变得巨大。它们由具有 TB 级内存占用的稀疏部分和需要 PFLOP 级计算能力进行训练的密集部分组成。不幸的是，为两个部分的不同并行策略重新组织数据的高稀疏通信成本阻碍了训练的可扩展性。

items.title: Training one DeePMD Model in Minutes: a Step towards Online Learning.
items.abstract: Neural Network Molecular Dynamics (NNMD) has become a major approach in material simulations, which can speedup the molecular dynamics (MD) simulation for thousands of times, while maintaining ab initio accuracy, thus has a potential to fundamentally change the paradigm of material simulations. However, there are two time-consuming bottlenecks of the NNMD developments. One is the data access of ab initio calculation results. The other, which is the focus of the current work, is reducing the training time of NNMD model. The training of NNMD model is different from most other neural network training because the atomic force (which is related to the gradient of the network) is an important physical property to be fit. Tests show the traditional stochastic gradient methods, like the Adam algorithms, cannot efficiently deploy the multisample minibatch algorithm. As a result, a typical training (taking the Deep Potential Molecular Dynamics (DeePMD) as an example) can take many hours. In this work, we designed a heuristic minibatch quasi-Newtonian optimizer based on Extended Kalman Filter method. An early reduction of gradient and error is adopted to reduce memory footprint and communication. The memory footprint, communication and settings of hyper-parameters of this new method are analyzed in detail. Computational innovations such as customized kernels of the symmetry-preserving descriptor are applied to exploit the computing power of the heterogeneous architecture. Experiments are performed on 8 different datasets representing different real case situations, and numerical results show that our new method has an average speedup of 32.2 compared to the Reorganized Layer-wised Extended Kalman Filter with 1 GPU, reducing the absolute training time of one DeePMD model from hours to several minutes, making it one step toward online training.
items.abstract_zh: 神经网络分子动力学（NNMD）已成为材料模拟的主要方法，它可以将分子动力学（MD）模拟加速数千倍，同时保持从头算的精度，因此有可能从根本上改变材料模拟的范式。然而，NNMD 的发展存在两个耗时的瓶颈。一是从头计算结果的数据访问。另一个是当前工作的重点，是减少NNMD模型的训练时间。 NNMD模型的训练与大多数其他神经网络训练不同，因为原子力（与网络的梯度有关）是需要拟合的重要物理性质。测试表明，传统的随机梯度方法（例如 Adam 算法）无法有效地部署多样本小批量算法。因此，一次典型的训练（以深势分子动力学（DeePMD）为例）可能需要几个小时。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器方法的启发式小批量拟牛顿优化器。采用早期减少梯度和误差来减少内存占用和通信。详细分析了这种新方法的内存占用、通信和超参数设置。应用计算创新（例如保留对称描述符的定制内核）来利用异构架构的计算能力。在代表不同实际情况的 8 个不同数据集上进行了实验，数值结果表明，与具有 1 个 GPU 的重组分层扩展卡尔曼滤波器相比，我们的新方法平均加速为 32.2，将一个 DeePMD 模型的绝对训练时间从几小时缩短到几分钟，使其向在线训练迈出了一步。

items.title: POSTER: Optimizing Collective Communications with Error-bounded Lossy Compression for GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: GPU-aware collective communication has become a major bottleneck for modern computing platforms as GPU computing power rapidly rises. To address this issue, traditional approaches integrate lossy compression directly into GPU-aware collectives, which still suffer from serious issues such as underutilized GPU devices and uncontrolled data distortion. In this paper, we propose GPU-LCC, a general framework that designs and optimizes GPU-aware, compression-enabled collectives with well-controlled error propagation. To validate our framework, we evaluate the performance on up to 64 NVIDIA A100 GPUs with real-world applications and datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our GPU-LCC-accelerated collective computation (Allreduce), can outperform NCCL as well as Cray MPI by up to 3.4× and 18.7×, respectively. Furthermore, our accuracy evaluation with an image-stacking application confirms the high reconstructed data quality of our accuracy-aware framework.
items.abstract_zh: 随着GPU计算能力的迅速提升，GPU感知的集体通信已成为现代计算平台的主要瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，传统方法将有损压缩直接集成到 GPU 感知的集合中，但这些集合仍然面临 GPU 设备未充分利用和不受控制的数据失真等严重问题。在本文中，我们提出了 GPU-LCC，这是一个通用框架，用于设计和优化 GPU 感知、支持压缩的集合，并具有良好控制的错误传播。为了验证我们的框架，我们使用真实应用程序和数据集评估了多达 64 个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 的性能。实验结果表明，我们的 GPU-LCC 加速集体计算 (Allreduce) 的性能比 NCCL 和 Cray MPI 分别高出 3.4 倍和 18.7 倍。此外，我们使用图像堆叠应用程序进行的准确性评估证实了我们的准确性感知框架的高重建数据质量。

items.title: OsirisBFT: Say No to Task Replication for Scalable Byzantine Fault Tolerant Analytics.
items.abstract: We present a verification-based Byzantine Fault Tolerant processing system, called OsirisBFT, for distributed task-parallel applications. OsirisBFT treats computation tasks differently from state update tasks, allowing the application to scale independently from number of expected failures. OsirisBFT captures application-specific verification semantics via generic verification operators and employs lightweight verification strategies with little coordination during graceful execution. Evaluation across multiple applications and workloads shows that OsirisBFT delivers high processing throughput and scalability compared to replicated processing. Importantly, the scalable nature of OsirisBFT enables it to reduce the performance gap compared to baseline with no fault tolerance by simply scaling out.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于验证的拜占庭容错处理系统，称为 OsirisBFT，用于分布式任务并行应用程序。 OsirisBFT 以不同于状态更新任务的方式处理计算任务，允许应用程序独立于预期故障数量进行扩展。 OsirisBFT 通过通用验证运算符捕获特定于应用程序的验证语义，并采用轻量级验证策略，在优雅执行期间几乎不需要协调。对多个应用程序和工作负载的评估表明，与复制处理相比，OsirisBFT 提供了高处理吞吐量和可扩展性。重要的是，OsirisBFT 的可扩展性使其能够通过简单地横向扩展来缩小与无容错基准相比的性能差距。

items.title: Fast Kronecker Matrix-Matrix Multiplication on GPUs.
items.abstract: Kronecker Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (Kron-Matmul) is the multiplication of a matrix with the Kronecker Product of several smaller matrices. Kron-Matmul is a core operation for many scientific and machine learning computations. State-of-the-art Kron-Matmul implementations utilize existing tensor algebra operations, such as matrix multiplication, transpose, and tensor matrix multiplication. However, this design choice prevents several Kron-Matmul specific optimizations, thus, leaving significant performance on the table.
items.abstract_zh: 克罗内克矩阵-矩阵乘法 (Kron-Matmul) 是一个矩阵与几个较小矩阵的克罗内克积的乘法。 Kron-Matmul 是许多科学和机器学习计算的核心运算。最先进的 Kron-Matmul 实现利用现有的张量代数运算，例如矩阵乘法、转置和张量矩阵乘法。然而，这种设计选择阻止了一些 Kron-Matmul 特定的优化，因此，留下了显着的性能。

items.title: POSTER: Accelerating High-Precision Integer Multiplication used in Cryptosystems with GPUs.
items.abstract: High-precision integer multiplication is crucial in privacy-preserving computational techniques but poses acceleration challenges on GPUs due to its complexity and the diverse bit lengths in cryptosystems. This paper introduces GIM, an efficient high-precision integer multiplication algorithm accelerated with GPUs. It employs a novel segmented integer multiplication algorithm that separates implementation details from bit length, facilitating code optimizations. We also present a computation diagram to analyze parallelization strategies, leading to a series of enhancements. Experiments demonstrate that this approach achieves a 4.47× speedup over the commonly used baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 高精度整数乘法对于隐私保护计算技术至关重要，但由于其复杂性和密码系统中不同的位长度，给 GPU 带来了加速挑战。本文介绍了 GIM，一种使用 GPU 加速的高效高精度整数乘法算法。它采用新颖的分段整数乘法算法，将实现细节与位长度分开，从而促进代码优化。我们还提供了一个计算图来分析并行化策略，从而带来一系列的增强。实验表明，这种方法比常用的基线实现了 4.47 倍的加速。

items.title: Practical Hardware Transactional vEB Trees.
items.abstract: van Emde Boas (vEB) trees are sequential data structures optimized for extremely fast predecessor and successor queries. Such queries are an important incentive to use ordered sets or maps such as vEB trees. All operations in a vEB tree are doubly logarithmic in the universe size. Attempts to implement concurrent vEB trees have either simplified their structure in a way that eliminated their ability to perform fast predecessor and successor queries, or have otherwise compromised on doubly logarithmic complexity. In this work, we leverage Hardware Transactional Memory (HTM) to implement vEB tree-based sets and maps in which operations are doubly logarithmic in the absence of contention. Our proposed concurrent vEB tree is the first to implement recursive summaries, the key algorithmic component of fast predecessor and successor operations. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art concurrent maps by an average of 5× in a moderately skewed workload, and the single-threaded C++ standard ordered map and its unordered map by 70% and 14%, respectively. And, it does so while using two orders of magnitude less memory than traditional vEB trees.
items.abstract_zh: van Emde Boas (vEB) 树是针对极快的前驱和后继查询而优化的顺序数据结构。此类查询是使用有序集或映射（例如 vEB 树）的重要动机。 vEB 树中的所有操作在宇宙大小上都是双对数的。实现并发 vEB 树的尝试要么简化了其结构，从而消除了执行快速前驱和后继查询的能力，要么在双对数复杂性上做出了妥协。在这项工作中，我们利用硬件事务内存（HTM）来实现基于 vEB 树的集合和映射，其中操作在没有争用的情况下是双对数的。我们提出的并发 vEB 树是第一个实现递归摘要的树，递归摘要是快速前驱和后继操作的关键算法组件。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们的算法在适度倾斜的工作负载中比最先进的并发映射平均性能高出 5 倍，单线程 C++ 标准有序映射及其无序映射分别高出 70% 和 14%。而且，它使用的内存比传统 vEB 树少两个数量级。

items.title: Are Your Epochs Too Epic? Batch Free Can Be Harmful.
items.abstract: Epoch based memory reclamation (EBR) is one of the most popular techniques for reclaiming memory in lock-free and optimistic locking data structures, due to its ease of use and good performance in practice. However, EBR is known to be sensitive to thread delays, which can result in performance degradation. Moreover, the exact mechanism for this performance degradation is not well understood.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 Epoch 的内存回收 (EBR) 是无锁和乐观锁定数据结构中最流行的内存回收技术之一，因为它易于使用且在实践中具有良好的性能。然而，众所周知，EBR 对线程延迟很敏感，这可能会导致性能下降。此外，这种性能下降的确切机制尚不清楚。

items.title: POSTER: ParGNN: Efficient Training for Large-Scale Graph Neural Network on GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: Full-batch graph neural network (GNN) training is essential for interdisciplinary applications. Large-scale graph data is usually divided into subgraphs and distributed across multiple compute units to train GNN. The state-of-the-art load balancing method based on direct graph partition is too rough to effectively achieve true load balancing on GPU clusters. We propose ParGNN, which employs a profiler-guided load balance workflow in conjunction with graph repartition to alleviate load imbalance and minimize communication traffic. Experiments have verified that ParGNN has the capability to scale to larger clusters.
items.abstract_zh: 全批量图神经网络（GNN）训练对于跨学科应用至关重要。大规模图数据通常被划分为子图并分布在多个计算单元上来训练 GNN。基于直接图划分的最先进的负载均衡方法过于粗糙，无法有效地在 GPU 集群上实现真正的负载均衡。我们提出 ParGNN，它采用分析器引导的负载平衡工作流程与图重新分区相结合，以减轻负载不平衡并最大限度地减少通信流量。实验验证了 ParGNN 具有扩展到更大集群的能力。

items.title: POSTER: RadiK: Scalable Radix Top-K Selection on GPUs.
items.abstract: By identifying the k largest or smallest elements in a set of data, top-k selection is critical for modern high-performance databases and machine learning systems, especially with large data volumes. However, previous studies on its GPU implementation are mostly merge-based and rely heavily on the high-speed but size-limited on-chip memory, thereby resulting in a restricted upper bound on k. This paper introduces RadiK, a highly optimized GPU-parallel radix top-k selection that is scalable with k, input length, and batch size. With a carefully designed optimization framework targeting high memory bandwidth and resource utilization, RadiK supports far larger k than the prior art, achieving up to 2.5× speedup for non-batch queries and up to 4.8× speedup for batch queries. We also propose a lightweight refinement that strengthens the robustness of RadiK against skewed distributions by adaptively scaling the input elements.
items.abstract_zh: 通过识别一组数据中 k 个最大或最小的元素，top-k 选择对于现代高性能数据库和机器学习系统至关重要，尤其是在数据量较大的情况下。然而，之前对其GPU实现的研究大多是基于合并的，并且严重依赖高速但大小有限的片上存储器，从而导致k的上限受到限制。本文介绍了 RadiK，一种高度优化的 GPU 并行基数 top-k 选择，可根据 k、输入长度和批量大小进行扩展。凭借针对高内存带宽和资源利用率精心设计的优化框架，RadiK 支持远大于现有技术的 k，实现非批量查询高达 2.5 倍的加速，批量查询高达 4.8 倍的加速。我们还提出了一种轻量级改进，通过自适应缩放输入元素来增强 RadiK 针对偏斜分布的鲁棒性。

items.title: Exploiting Fine-Grained Redundancy in Set-Centric Graph Pattern Mining.
items.abstract: Graph Pattern Mining (GPM) applications are memory intensive as they require a tremendous amount of edge checks. In recent years, the "set-centric" abstraction has gained attention for its powerful expressive abilities. By leveraging relational algebra, they optimized algorithms with methods like matching orders, early termination, automorphism-breaking, and result reuse to reduce redundancy. However, these approaches primarily address coarse-grained redundancy from exactly the same set formulas, neglecting that the data graph's inherent locality may lead to fine-grained duplicated edge checks. In fact, even unrelated set operations may check the same pair of vertices. This paper introduces the set union operation to the set-centric abstraction to fuse duplicated edge checks into one. It maintains the expressive power of relational algebra and previous optimizations while effectively avoids fine-grained redundancy in GPM tasks. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves significant speedup on a V100 GPU cluster, demonstrating up to 305 × faster performance than the state-of-the-art GPM system G2Miner.
items.abstract_zh: 图模式挖掘（GPM）应用程序是内存密集型的，因为它们需要大量的边缘检查。近年来，“以集合为中心”的抽象因其强大的表达能力而受到关注。通过利用关系代数，他们通过匹配顺序、提前终止、自同构破坏和结果重用等方法来优化算法，以减少冗余。然而，这些方法主要解决来自完全相同的集合公式的粗粒度冗余，忽略了数据图的固有局部性可能导致细粒度的重复边缘检查。事实上，即使不相关的集合操作也可能检查同一对顶点。本文将集合并操作引入到以集合为中心的抽象中，以将重复的边缘检查融合为一。它保持了关系代数和之前优化的表达能力，同时有效避免了 GPM 任务中的细粒度冗余。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 V100 GPU 集群上实现了显着的加速，表现出比最先进的 GPM 系统 G2Miner 快 305 倍的性能。

items.title: Parallel k-Core Decomposition with Batched Updates and Asynchronous Reads.
items.abstract: Maintaining a dynamic k-core decomposition is an important problem that identifies dense subgraphs in dynamically changing graphs. Recent work by Liu et al. [SPAA 2022] presents a parallel batch-dynamic algorithm for maintaining an approximate k-core decomposition. In their solution, both reads and updates need to be batched, and therefore each type of operation can incur high latency waiting for the other type to finish. To tackle most real-world workloads, which are dominated by reads, this paper presents a novel hybrid concurrent-parallel dynamic k-core data structure where asynchronous reads can proceed concurrently with batches of updates, leading to significantly lower read latencies. Our approach is based on tracking causal dependencies between updates, so that causally related groups of updates appear atomic to concurrent readers. Our data structure guarantees linearizability and liveness for both reads and updates, and maintains the same approximation guarantees as prior work. Our experimental evaluation on a 30-core machine shows that our approach reduces read latency by orders of magnitude compared to the batch-dynamic algorithm, up to a (4.05 · 105)-factor. Compared to an unsynchronized (non-linearizable) baseline, our read latency overhead is only up to a 3.21-factor greater, while improving accuracy of coreness estimates by up to a factor of 52.7.
items.abstract_zh: 维护动态 k 核分解是识别动态变化图中的密集子图的一个重要问题。刘等人的最新工作。 [SPAA 2022] 提出了一种并行批动态算法，用于维持近似的 k 核分解。在他们的解决方案中，读取和更新都需要进行批处理，因此每种类型的操作在等待另一种类型完成时都会产生高延迟。为了解决大多数以读取为主的实际工作负载，本文提出了一种新颖的混合并发并行动态 k 核数据结构，其中异步读取可以与批量更新同时进行，从而显着降低读取延迟。我们的方法基于跟踪更新之间的因果依赖性，以便因果相关的更新组对于并发读者来说是原子的。我们的数据结构保证了读取和更新的线性化和活跃性，并保持与先前工作相同的近似保证。我们在 30 核机器上的实验评估表明，与批动态算法相比，我们的方法将读取延迟减少了几个数量级，高达 (4.05 · 105) 因子。与非同步（不可线性化）基线相比，我们的读取延迟开销仅增加了 3.21 倍，同时将核心估计的准确性提高了 52.7 倍。

items.title: Tetris: Accelerating Sparse Convolution by Exploiting Memory Reuse on GPU.
items.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved remarkable success in various application fields. Although model compression techniques mitigate the ever-increasing resource demands of large CNN models, the compressed models usually exhibit irregular memory access and unstructured sparsity, which are difficult for dominant operators such as sparse convolution to achieve expected performance speedup on popular inference platforms such as GPU. In this paper, we propose Tetris, an efficient sparse convolution approach optimized for GPU. Tetris first fully exploits the input reuse opportunity of sparse convolution to reduce the memory accesses to global memory. It then adopts a stride packed filter (SPF) format and a bank-sensing reorganization scheme to eliminate the irregular memory accesses caused by unstructured sparsity. It also leverages a filter group reorder technique to address load imbalance among threads, and a parameter tuning method to determine the optimal parameters of the sparse convolution implementation. The experiment results show that Tetris outperforms dense/sparse convolution libraries and cutting-edge implementations with promising performance speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在各个应用领域取得了显着的成功。尽管模型压缩技术缓解了大型 CNN 模型不断增长的资源需求，但压缩后的模型通常表现出不规则的内存访问和非结构化稀疏性，这对于稀疏卷积等主导算子来说很难在 GPU 等流行的推理平台上实现预期的性能加速。在本文中，我们提出了俄罗斯方块，这是一种针对 GPU 优化的高效稀疏卷积方法。俄罗斯方块首先充分利用稀疏卷积的输入重用机会来减少对全局内存的内存访问。然后，它采用跨步打包过滤器（SPF）格式和存储体感知重组方案来消除由非结构化稀疏性引起的不规则内存访问。它还利用滤波器​​组重新排序技术来解决线程之间的负载不平衡问题，并利用参数调整方法来确定稀疏卷积实现的最佳参数。实验结果表明，俄罗斯方块的性能优于密集/稀疏卷积库和尖端实现，并且有望实现性能加速。

items.title: POSTER: FineCo: Fine-grained Heterogeneous Resource Management for Concurrent DNN Inferences.
items.abstract: Co-locating multiple DNN servings to share GPU resource is widely used to improve resource utilization while guaranteeing user QoS. Existing GPU sharing mechanism is restricted to model level, and fluctuations in kernel-level resource demands highlight a suboptimal utilization of the current sharing mechanism. We design a multi-DNN serving system, FineCo, that leverages a novel fine-grained resource sharing mechanism to optimize concurrent inference without modifications to the hardware or operating system. Our prototype implementation demonstrates that FineCo achieves up to 40% throughput improvement over the state-of-the-art work.
items.abstract_zh: 共置多个 DNN 服务以共享 GPU 资源被广泛使用，以在保证用户 QoS 的同时提高资源利用率。现有的GPU共享机制仅限于模型级别，内核级资源需求的波动凸显了当前共享机制的次优利用。我们设计了一个多 DNN 服务系统 FineCo，它利用新颖的细粒度资源共享机制来优化并发推理，而无需修改硬件或操作系统。我们的原型实施表明，FineCo 的吞吐量比最先进的工作提高了 40%。

items.title: ParlayANN: Scalable and Deterministic Parallel Graph-Based Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search Algorithms.
items.abstract: Approximate nearest-neighbor search (ANNS) algorithms are a key part of the modern deep learning stack due to enabling efficient similarity search over high-dimensional vector space representations (i.e., embeddings) of data. Among various ANNS algorithms, graph-based algorithms are known to achieve the best throughput-recall tradeoffs. Despite the large scale of modern ANNS datasets, existing parallel graph-based implementations suffer from significant challenges to scale to large datasets due to heavy use of locks and other sequential bottlenecks, which 1) prevents them from efficiently scaling to a large number of processors, and 2) results in non-determinism that is undesirable in certain applications.
items.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 算法是现代深度学习堆栈的关键部分，因为它可以对数据的高维向量空间表示（即嵌入）进行有效的相似性搜索。在各种 ANNS 算法中，众所周知，基于图的算法可以实现最佳的吞吐量-召回率权衡。尽管现代 ANNS 数据集规模很大，但由于大量使用锁和其他顺序瓶颈，现有的基于并行图的实现在扩展到大型数据集时面临着重大挑战，这 1) 阻止它们有效地扩展到大量处理器，2) 导致不确定性，这在某些应用程序中是不受欢迎的。

items.title: Gallatin: A General-Purpose GPU Memory Manager.
items.abstract: Dynamic memory management is critical for efficiently porting modern data processing pipelines to GPUs. However, building a general-purpose dynamic memory manager on GPUs is challenging due to the massive parallelism and weak memory coherence. Existing state-of-the-art GPU memory managers, Ouroboros and Reg-Eff, employ traditional data structures such as arrays and linked lists to manage memory objects. They build specialized pipelines to achieve performance for a fixed set of allocation sizes and fall back to the CUDA allocator for allocating large sizes. In the process, they lose general-purpose usability and fail to support critical applications such as streaming graph processing.
items.abstract_zh: 动态内存管理对于将现代数据处理管道有效移植到 GPU 至关重要。然而，由于大规模并行性和弱内存一致性，在 GPU 上构建通用动态内存管理器具有挑战性。现有最先进的 GPU 内存管理器 Ouroboros 和 Reg-Eff 采用数组和链表等传统数据结构来管理内存对象。他们构建专门的管道来实现一组固定分配大小的性能，并回退到 CUDA 分配器来分配大大小。在此过程中，它们失去了通用可用性，并且无法支持流图处理等关键应用程序。

items.title: POSTER: OCToPus: Semantic-aware Concurrency Control for Blockchain Transactions.
items.abstract: Many blockchain implementations offer APIs to send and receive money between accounts exclusively. In this paper, we introduce OCToPus, a deterministic concurrency control scheme that uses a semantic-aware fast path and a GPU-accelerated directed acyclic graph-based fallback path to parallelize the execution of a block aggressively.
items.abstract_zh: 许多区块链实现提供 API 来专门在账户之间发送和接收资金。在本文中，我们介绍了 OCToPus，这是一种确定性并发控制方案，它使用语义感知快速路径和 GPU 加速的基于有向无环图的后备路径来积极并行化块的执行。

items.title: Language-Agnostic Static Deadlock Detection for Futures.
items.abstract: Deadlocks, in which threads wait on each other in a cyclic fashion and can't make progress, have plagued parallel programs for decades. In recent years, as the parallel programming mechanism known as futures has gained popularity, interest in preventing deadlocks in programs with futures has increased as well. Various static and dynamic algorithms exist to detect and prevent deadlock in programs with futures, generally by constructing some approximation of the dependency graph of the program but, as far as we are aware, all are specialized to a particular programming language.
items.abstract_zh: 死锁（线程以循环方式相互等待并且无法取得进展）几十年来一直困扰着并行程序。近年来，随着被称为 future 的并行编程机制越来越流行，人们对使用 future 防止程序死锁的兴趣也随之增加。存在各种静态和动态算法来检测和防止具有未来的程序中的死锁，通常通过构造程序的依赖关系图的某种近似值，但据我们所知，所有算法都专门针对特定的编程语言。

items.title: A Row Decomposition-based Approach for Sparse Matrix Multiplication on GPUs.
items.abstract: Sparse-Matrix Dense-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) and Sampled Dense Dense Matrix Multiplication (SDDMM) are important sparse kernels in various computation domains. The uneven distribution of nonzeros in the sparse matrix and the tight data dependence between sparse and dense matrices make it a challenge to run sparse matrix multiplication efficiently on GPUs. By analyzing the aforementioned problems, we propose a row decomposition (RoDe)-based approach to optimize the two kernels on GPUs, using the standard Compressed Sparse Row (CSR) format. Specifically, RoDe divides the sparse matrix rows into regular parts and residual parts, to fully optimize their computations separately. We also devise the corresponding load balancing and finegrained pipelining technologies. Profiling results show that RoDe can achieve more efficient memory access and reduce warp stall cycles significantly. Compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) alternatives, RoDe achieves a speedup of up to 7.86× with a geometric mean of 1.45× for SpMM, and a speedup of up to 8.99× with a geometric mean of 1.49× for SDDMM; the dataset is SuiteSparse. RoDe also outperforms its counterpart in the deep learning dataset. Furthermore, its preprocessing overhead is significantly smaller, averaging only 16% of the SOTA.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵稠密矩阵乘法（SpMM）和采样稠密矩阵乘法（SDDMM）是各种计算领域中重要的稀疏内核。稀疏矩阵中非零值的不均匀分布以及稀疏矩阵和稠密矩阵之间的紧密数据依赖性使得在 GPU 上高效运行稀疏矩阵乘法成为一项挑战。通过分析上述问题，我们提出了一种基于行分解 (RoDe) 的方法，使用标准压缩稀疏行 (CSR) 格式来优化 GPU 上的两个内核。具体来说，RoDe将稀疏矩阵行分为常规部分和残差部分，以分别充分优化它们的计算。我们还设计了相应的负载均衡和细粒度流水线技术。分析结果表明，RoDe 可以实现更高效的内存访问并显着减少扭曲停顿周期。与最先进的（SOTA）替代方案相比，RoDe 对 SpMM 的加速比高达 7.86×，几何平均值为 1.45×，对 SDMMM 的加速比高达 8.99×，几何平均值为 1.49×；数据集是 SuiteSparse。 RoDe 在深度学习数据集中的表现也优于同类产品。此外，其预处理开销显着较小，平均仅为 SOTA 的 16%。

items.title: Locks as a Resource: Fairly Scheduling Lock Occupation with CFL.
items.abstract: In multi-container environments, applications oftentimes experience unexpected performance fluctuations due to undesirable interference among applications. Synchronization such as locks has been targeted as one of the reasons but still remains an uncontrolled resource while a large set of locks are still shared across applications. In this paper, we demonstrate that this lack of lock scheduling incurs significant real-world problems including performance unfairness and interference among applications. To address this problem, we propose a new synchronization design with an embedded scheduling capability, called CFL (Completely Fair Locking). CFL fairly distributes a fair amount of lock occupation time to applications considering their priorities and cgroup information. For scalability, CFL also considers the NUMA topology in the case of NUMA machines. Experimental results demonstrate that CFL significantly improves performance fairness while achieving comparable or sometimes even superior performance to state-of-the-art locks.
items.abstract_zh: 在多容器环境中，由于应用程序之间的不良干扰，应用程序经常会遇到意外的性能波动。诸如锁之类的同步已成为原因之一，但仍然是不受控制的资源，而大量锁仍然在应用程序之间共享。在本文中，我们证明了锁调度的缺乏会带来严重的现实问题，包括性能不公平和应用程序之间的干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有嵌入式调度功能的新同步设计，称为 CFL（完全公平锁定）。 CFL 考虑应用程序的优先级和 cgroup 信息，公平地将相当数量的锁占用时间分配给应用程序。为了可扩展性，CFL 还考虑了 NUMA 机器的 NUMA 拓扑。实验结果表明，CFL 显着提高了性能公平性，同时实现了与最先进的锁相当甚至有时甚至更优越的性能。

items.title: AGAThA: Fast and Efficient GPU Acceleration of Guided Sequence Alignment for Long Read Mapping.
items.abstract: With the advance in genome sequencing technology, the lengths of deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) sequencing results are rapidly increasing at lower prices than ever. However, the longer lengths come at the cost of a heavy computational burden on aligning them. For example, aligning sequences to a human reference genome can take tens or even hundreds of hours. The current de facto standard approach for alignment is based on the guided dynamic programming method. Although this takes a long time and could potentially benefit from high-throughput graphic processing units (GPUs), the existing GPU-accelerated approaches often compromise the algorithm's structure, due to the GPU-unfriendly nature of the computational pattern. Unfortunately, such compromise in the algorithm is not tolerable in the field, because sequence alignment is a part of complicated bioinformatics analysis pipelines. In such circumstances, we propose AGAThA, an exact and efficient GPU-based acceleration of guided sequence alignment. We diagnose and address the problems of the algorithm being unfriendly to GPUs, which comprises strided/redundant memory accesses and workload imbalances that are difficult to predict. According to the experiments on modern GPUs, AGAThA achieves 18.8× speedup against the CPU-based baseline, 9.6× against the best GPU-based baseline, and 3.6× against GPU-based algorithms with different heuristics.
items.abstract_zh: 随着基因组测序技术的进步，脱氧核糖核酸（DNA）测序结果的长度正在以比以往更低的价格迅速增加。然而，较长的长度是以对齐它们时的沉重计算负担为代价的。例如，将序列与人类参考基因组进行比对可能需要数十甚至数百小时。当前事实上的对齐标准方法基于引导动态规划方法。尽管这需要很长时间并且可能受益于高吞吐量图形处理单元 (GPU)，但由于计算模式对 GPU 不友好的性质，现有的 GPU 加速方法常常会损害算法的结构。不幸的是，算法中的这种妥协在该领域是不能容忍的，因为序列比对是复杂的生物信息学分析流程的一部分。在这种情况下，我们提出了 AGAThA，一种基于 GPU 的精确且高效的引导序列比对加速。我们诊断并解决了算法对 GPU 不友好的问题，其中包括跨步/冗余内存访问和难以预测的工作负载不平衡。根据现代 GPU 上的实验，AGAThA 相对于基于 CPU 的基线实现了 18.8 倍的加速，相对于基于 GPU 的最佳基线实现了 9.6 倍的加速，相对于具有不同启发式的基于 GPU 的算法实现了 3.6 倍的加速。

items.title: INFINEL: An efficient GPU-based processing method for unpredictable large output graph queries.
items.abstract: With the introduction of GPUs, which are specialized for iterative parallel computations, the execution of computation-intensive graph queries using a GPU has seen significant performance improvements. However, due to the memory constraints of GPUs, there has been limited research on handling large-scale output graph queries with unpredictable output sizes on a GPU. Traditionally, two-phase methods have been used, where the query is re-executed after splitting it into sub-tasks while only considering the size of the output in a static manner. However, two-phase methods become highly inefficient when used with graph data with extreme skew, failing to maximize the GPU performance. This paper proposes INFINEL, which handles unpredictable large output graph queries in a one-phase method through chunk allocation per thread and kernel stop/restart methods. We also propose applicable optimization techniques due to the corresponding unique characteristics of operating with low time/space overhead and not heavily relying on the GPU output buffer size. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our one-phase method of INFINEL improves the performance by up to 31.5 times over the conventional two-phase methods for triangle listing ULO query.
items.abstract_zh: 随着专门用于迭代并行计算的 GPU 的引入，使用 GPU 执行计算密集型图形查询的性能得到了显着提高。然而，由于 GPU 的内存限制，在 GPU 上处理具有不可预测的输出大小的大规模输出图查询的研究有限。传统上，使用两阶段方法，将查询拆分为子任务后重新执行，同时仅以静态方式考虑输出的大小。然而，当与极端倾斜的图数据一起使用时，两阶段方法会变得非常低效，无法最大限度地提高 GPU 性能。本文提出了 INFINEL，它通过每线程的块分配和内核停止/重新启动方法，以一阶段方法处理不可预测的大型输出图查询。由于具有低时间/空间开销且不严重依赖 GPU 输出缓冲区大小的相应独特特性，我们还提出了适用的优化技术。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们的 INFINEL 的一阶段方法比传统的两阶段方法在三角形列表 ULO 查询方面的性能提高了 31.5 倍。

items.title: Pure: Evolving Message Passing To Better Leverage Shared Memory Within Nodes.
items.abstract: Pure is a new programming model and runtime system explicitly designed to take advantage of shared memory within nodes in the context of a mostly message passing interface enhanced with the ability to use tasks to make use of idle cores. Pure leverages shared memory in two ways: (a) by allowing cores to steal work from each other while waiting on messages to arrive, and, (b) by leveraging efficient lock-free data structures in shared memory to achieve high-performance messaging and collective operations between the ranks within nodes. We use microbenchmarks to evaluate Pure's key messaging and collective features and also show application speedups up to 2.1× on the CoMD molecular dynamics and the miniAMR adaptive mesh refinement applications scaling up to 4,096 cores.
items.abstract_zh: Pure 是一种新的编程模型和运行时系统，明确设计为在主要是消息传递接口的上下文中利用节点内的共享内存，并增强了使用任务来利用空闲核心的能力。 Pure 通过两种方式利用共享内存：(a) 允许核心在等待消息到达时互相窃取工作，以及 (b) 利用共享内存中高效的无锁数据结构来实现节点内队列之间的高性能消息传递和集体操作。我们使用微基准来评估 Pure 的关键消息传递和集体功能，并在 CoMD 分子动力学和可扩展至 4,096 个核心的 miniAMR 自适应网格细化应用程序上显示高达 2.1 倍的应用程序加速。

items.title: Towards Scalable Unstructured Mesh Computations on Shared Memory Many-Cores.
items.abstract: Due to data conflicts or data dependences, exploiting shared memory parallelism on unstructured mesh applications is highly challenging. The prior approaches are neither general nor scalable on emerging many-core processors. This paper presents a general and scalable shared memory approach for unstructured mesh computations. We recursively divide and reorder an unstructured mesh to construct a task dependency tree (TDT), where massive parallelism is exposed and data conflicts as well as data dependences are respected. We propose two recursion strategies to support popular programming models on both CPUs and GPUs for TDT. We evaluate our approach by applying it to an industrial unstructured Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) software. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms the prior shared memory approaches, delivering up to 8.1× performance improvement over the engineer-tuned implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 由于数据冲突或数据依赖性，在非结构化网格应用程序上利用共享内存并行性非常具有挑战性。先前的方法在新兴的多核处理器上既不通用也不可扩展。本文提出了一种用于非结构化网格计算的通用且可扩展的共享内存方法。我们递归地划分和重新排序非结构化网格来构建任务依赖树（TDT），其中暴露了大规模并行性并尊重数据冲突和数据依赖性。我们提出了两种递归策略来支持 TDT 的 CPU 和 GPU 上的流行编程模型。我们通过将其应用于工业非结构化计算流体动力学 (CFD) 软件来评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于之前的共享内存方法，与工程师调整的实现相比，性能提高了 8.1 倍。

items.title: Scaling Up Transactions with Slower Clocks.
items.abstract: Concurrency controls with optimistic read accesses and pessimistic write accesses are among the fastest in the literature. However, during write transactions these algorithms need to increment an atomic variable, the central clock, limiting parallelism and preventing scalability at high core counts.
items.abstract_zh: 具有乐观读取访问和悲观写入访问的并发控制是文献中最快的。然而，在写入事务期间，这些算法需要增加原子变量（中央时钟），从而限制并行性并阻止高核心数下的可扩展性。

items.title: Sparsity in Deep Neural Nets (Keynote).
items.abstract: Our brain executes very sparse computation, allowing for great speed and energy savings. Deep neural networks can also be made to exhibit high levels of sparsity without significant accuracy loss. As their size grows, it is becoming imperative that we use sparsity to improve their efficiency. This is a challenging task because the memory systems and SIMD operations that dominate todays CPUs and GPUs do not lend themselves easily to the irregular data patterns sparsity introduces. This talk will survey the role of sparsity in neural network computation, and the parallel algorithms and hardware features that nevertheless allow us to make effective use of it.
items.abstract_zh: 我们的大脑执行非常稀疏的计算，从而可以提高速度并节省能源。深度神经网络也可以表现出高水平的稀疏性，而不会显着损失准确性。随着它们规模的增长，我们必须利用稀疏性来提高它们的效率。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为主导当今 CPU 和 GPU 的内存系统和 SIMD 操作不容易适应稀疏性引入的不规则数据模式。本演讲将探讨稀疏性在神经网络计算中的作用，以及允许我们有效利用它的并行算法和硬件功能。

items.title: CPMA: An Efficient Batch-Parallel Compressed Set Without Pointers.
items.abstract: This paper introduces the batch-parallel Compressed Packed Memory Array (CPMA), a compressed, dynamic, ordered set data structure based on the Packed Memory Array (PMA). Traditionally, batch-parallel sets are built on pointer-based data structures such as trees because pointer-based structures enable fast parallel unions via pointer manipulation. When compared with cache-optimized trees, PMAs were slower to update but faster to scan.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了批量并行压缩打包内存阵列（CPMA），这是一种基于打包内存阵列（PMA）的压缩、动态、有序集数据结构。传统上，批量并行集构建在基于指针的数据结构（例如树）上，因为基于指针的结构可以通过指针操作实现快速并行联合。与缓存优化树相比，PMA 更新速度较慢，但​​扫描速度较快。

items.title: Extreme-scale Direct Numerical Simulation of Incompressible Turbulence on the Heterogeneous Many-core System.
items.abstract: Direct numerical simulation (DNS) is a technique that directly solves the fluid Navier-Stokes equations with high spatial and temporal resolutions, which has driven much research regarding the nature of turbulence. For high-Reynolds number (Re) incompressible turbulence of particular interest, where the nondimensional Re characterizes the flow regime, the application of DNS is hindered by the fact that the numerical grid size (i.e., the memory requirement) scales with Re3, while the overall computational cost scales with Re4. Recent studies have shown that developing efficient parallel methods for heterogeneous many-core systems is promising to solve this computational challenge.
items.abstract_zh: 直接数值模拟（DNS）是一种直接求解具有高空间和时间分辨率的流体纳维-斯托克斯方程的技术，它推动了有关湍流本质的大量研究。对于特别感兴趣的高雷诺数 (Re) 不可压缩湍流，其中无量纲 Re 表征流态，DNS 的应用受到以下事实的阻碍：数值网格大小（即内存需求）随 Re3 缩放，而总体计算成本随 Re4 缩放。最近的研究表明，为异构多核系统开发高效的并行方法有望解决这一计算挑战。

items.title: A Holistic Approach to Automatic Mixed-Precision Code Generation and Tuning for Affine Programs.
items.abstract: Reducing floating-point (FP) precision is used to trade the quality degradation of a numerical program's output for performance, but this optimization coincides with type casting, whose overhead is undisclosed until a mixed-precision code version is generated. This uncertainty enforces the decoupled implementation of mixed-precision code generation and autotuning in prior work. In this paper, we present a holistic approach called PrecTuner that consolidates the mixed-precision code generator and the autotuner by defining one parameter. This parameter is first initialized by some automatically sampled values and used to generate several code variants, with various loop transformations also taken into account. The generated code variants are next profiled to solve a performance model formulated using the aforementioned parameter, possibly under a pre-defined quality degradation budget. The best-performing value of the defined parameter is finally predicted without evaluating all code variants. Experimental results of the PolyBench benchmarks on CPU demonstrate that PrecTuner outperforms LuIs by 3.28× while achieving smaller errors, and we also validate its effectiveness in optimizing a real-life large-scale application. In addition, PrecTuner also obtains a mean speedup of 1.81× and 1.52×-1.73× over Pluto on single- and multi-core CPU, respectively, and 1.71× over PPCG on GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 降低浮点 (FP) 精度用于以数值程序输出的质量下降来换取性能，但这种优化与类型转换同时发生，其开销在生成混合精度代码版本之前不会公开。这种不确定性迫使之前的工作中混合精度代码生成和自动调整的解耦实现。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 PrecTuner 的整体方法，它通过定义一个参数来整合混合精度代码生成器和自动调谐器。该参数首先由一些自动采样的值初始化，并用于生成多个代码变体，还考虑了各种循环转换。接下来分析生成的代码变体，以解决使用上述参数制定的性能模型，可能在预定义的质量退化预算下。最终预测所定义参数的最佳性能值，而无需评估所有代码变体。 CPU 上的 PolyBench 基准测试的实验结果表明，PrecTuner 的性能比 LuIs 提高了 3.28 倍，同时实现了更小的误差，并且我们还验证了其在优化现实大型应用程序中的有效性。此外，PrecTuner 在单核和多核 CPU 上比 Pluto 平均加速分别为 1.81 倍和 1.52 倍-1.73 倍，在 GPU 上比 PPCG 平均加速 1.71 倍。

items.title: POSTER: LLM-PQ: Serving LLM on Heterogeneous Clusters with Phase-Aware Partition and Adaptive Quantization.
POSTER: StructMG: A Fast and Scalable Structured Multigrid.
items.abstract: Parallel multigrid is widely used as preconditioners in solving large-scale sparse linear systems. However, the current multigrid library still needs more satisfactory performance for structured grid problems regarding speed and scalability. To this end, we design and implement StructMG, a fast and scalable multigrid that constructs hierarchical grids automatically based on the original matrix. As a preconditioner, StructMG can achieve both low cost per iteration and good convergence. Two idealized and five real-world problems from four application fields, including radiation hydrodynamics, petroleum reservoir simulation, numerical weather prediction, and solid mechanics, are evaluated on ARM and X86 platforms. In comparison to hypre's multigrid preconditioners, StructMG achieves the fastest time-to-solutions in all cases with average speedups of 17.6x, 5.7x, 4.6x, 8.5x over SMG, PFMG, SysPFMG, and BoomerAMG, respectively. Additionally, StructMG significantly improves strong and weak scaling efficiencies in most tests.
items.abstract_zh: 并行多重网格广泛用作求解大规模稀疏线性系统的预处理器。然而，当前的多重网格库在速度和可扩展性方面仍然需要更令人满意的性能来解决结构化网格问题。为此，我们设计并实现了 StructMG，这是一种快速且可扩展的多重网格，可以根据原始矩阵自动构建分层网格。作为预处理器，StructMG 可以实现每次迭代的低成本和良好的收敛性。在 ARM 和 X86 平台上评估了辐射流体动力学、石油储层模拟、数值天气预报和固体力学等四个应用领域的两个理想问题和五个现实问题。与 hypre 的多重网格预处理器相比，StructMG 在所有情况下都实现了最快的解决方案时间，比 SMG、PFMG、SysPFMG 和 BoomerAMG 平均加速分别为 17.6 倍、5.7 倍、4.6 倍、8.5 倍。此外，StructMG 在大多数测试中显着提高了强扩展和弱扩展效率。

items.title: POSTER: RELAX: Durable Data Structures with Swift Recovery.
items.abstract: Recent non-volatile main memory technology gave rise to an abundance of research on building persistent data structures, whose content can be recovered after a system crash. While there has been significant progress in making durable data structures efficient, shortening the length of the recovery phase after a crash has not received much attention. In this paper we present the RELAX general transformation. RELAX generates lock-free durable data structures that provide the best of both worlds: almost zero recovery time and high performance.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的非易失性主存储器技术引发了关于构建持久数据结构的大量研究，其内容可以在系统崩溃后恢复。尽管在提高持久数据结构的效率方面取得了重大进展，但缩短崩溃后恢复阶段的长度并没有引起太多关注。在本文中，我们提出了 RELAX 一般变换。 RELAX 生成无锁的持久数据结构，提供两全其美的功能：几乎零恢复时间和高性能。
